tasks.subject: Task 1: API auth helper and middleware
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `getUserId(req)` helper and `src/middleware.ts` so API key requests pass through to route handlers with userId injected.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/lib/api-auth.ts`
- Create: `src/lib/api-auth.test.ts`
- Create: `src/middleware.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `getUserId` returns session.user.id when NextAuth session present
- [ ] `getUserId` returns x-api-user-id header when session is null
- [ ] `getUserId` returns null when both absent
- [ ] Middleware rejects wrong API key with 401
- [ ] Middleware forwards correct API key, injecting x-api-user-id
- [ ] Middleware is no-op for requests without X-API-Key header
- [ ] Middleware does not apply to /api/auth/* routes
- [ ] All tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/lib/api-auth.test.ts` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/api-auth.ts", "src/lib/api-auth.test.ts", "src/middleware.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/lib/api-auth.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["getUserId returns session userId", "getUserId returns x-api-user-id header as fallback", "getUserId returns null when both absent", "Middleware rejects wrong key with 401", "Middleware forwards correct key with injected userId", "Middleware is no-op without X-API-Key", "All tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Update all route handlers to use getUserId
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace auth() + session.user.id with getUserId(req) in all 9 protected route files.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/api/tasks/route.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/tasks/[id]/route.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/tasks/[id]/subtasks/route.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/tasks/[id]/subtasks/[subtaskId]/route.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/tasks/reorder/route.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/projects/route.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/projects/[id]/route.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/tags/route.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/tags/[id]/route.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No route handler calls auth() directly
- [ ] No route handler references session.user.id
- [ ] auth import removed from all 9 route files
- [ ] All existing route tests still pass
- [ ] Route handlers that had no req param on GET now accept req: Request

**Verify:** `npx vitest run` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/api/tasks/route.ts", "src/app/api/tasks/[id]/route.ts", "src/app/api/tasks/[id]/subtasks/route.ts", "src/app/api/tasks/[id]/subtasks/[subtaskId]/route.ts", "src/app/api/tasks/reorder/route.ts", "src/app/api/projects/route.ts", "src/app/api/projects/[id]/route.ts", "src/app/api/tags/route.ts", "src/app/api/tags/[id]/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No direct auth() calls in route files", "All existing tests pass", "GET handlers accept req: Request"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Create task-manager-skill plugin scaffold
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the plugin directory with full skill file and push to a separate GitHub repo.

**Files:**
- Create: `task-manager-skill/.claude-plugin/plugin.json`
- Create: `task-manager-skill/skills/task-manager.md`
- Create: `task-manager-skill/README.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] plugin.json is valid JSON with name, description, version, author
- [ ] Skill covers all 13 CRUD operations with curl examples
- [ ] Skill references TASK_MANAGER_API_KEY and TASK_MANAGER_BASE_URL env vars
- [ ] Skill includes behavior rules (confirm before delete, show result, handle errors)
- [ ] README explains installation and env var setup
- [ ] Plugin loads: claude --plugin-dir ./task-manager-skill

**Verify:** `claude --plugin-dir ./task-manager-skill` then invoke `/task-manager` — skill loads

```json:metadata
{"files": ["task-manager-skill/.claude-plugin/plugin.json", "task-manager-skill/skills/task-manager.md", "task-manager-skill/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "claude --plugin-dir ./task-manager-skill", "acceptanceCriteria": ["plugin.json valid", "13 CRUD operations documented", "env var references correct", "behavior rules present", "README complete"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Configure env vars and verify end-to-end
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Set Vercel env vars, find owner userId, and verify full flow with real curl against production.

**Files:** No code changes — configuration only.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] CLAUDE_API_KEY set in Vercel production env
- [ ] CLAUDE_API_USER_ID set in Vercel production env
- [ ] TASK_MANAGER_API_KEY and TASK_MANAGER_BASE_URL set locally
- [ ] GET /api/tasks with API key returns 200
- [ ] UI still works (cookie auth unaffected)
- [ ] Wrong API key returns 401

**Verify:** `curl -s "$TASK_MANAGER_BASE_URL/api/tasks" -H "X-API-Key: $TASK_MANAGER_API_KEY" | head -c 200` → JSON array

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "curl -s \"$TASK_MANAGER_BASE_URL/api/tasks\" -H \"X-API-Key: $TASK_MANAGER_API_KEY\" | head -c 200", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CLAUDE_API_KEY in Vercel", "CLAUDE_API_USER_ID in Vercel", "GET /api/tasks returns 200 with API key", "Wrong key returns 401", "UI unaffected"]}
```
